title: syringa pubescens subsp. pubescens
intro: Syringa pubescens subsp. pubescens is a deciduous shrub or small tree, commonly known as the Amur lilac or Chinese lilac, native to northern China, Korea, and parts of Russia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Syringa pubescens subsp. pubescens include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia due to its sedative and antidepressant properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be prepared by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water, or by mixing them with other herbs in a tea blend.
